title: Cancelled notifications are retried
description: A retry worker treats every non-sent notification as retryable, including cancelled notifications.
requirement: REQ-NOTIFY-3: A cancelled notification must never be delivered or retried. Only pending notifications may be retried.

expectedFindings.title: Cancelled notifications are eligible for retry
expectedFindings.description: The retry guard excludes only sent notifications, allowing a cancelled message to be delivered later.

distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Tracking a retry count is expected for a pending notification.
